LanguageData.rimtalk_chatter.label: RimTalk conversations
LanguageData.rimtalk_chatter.instruction: ordinary conversation during the day - treat it as passing talk unless mood, need, or the pair's history makes a line land harder
LanguageData.rimtalk_chatter.instructions.0: day-to-day talk - pick the one supplied line or moment that left a trace, and why it did
LanguageData.rimtalk_chatter.instructions.1: day-to-day talk - write the feeling under the words: ease, friction, or distance
LanguageData.rimtalk_chatter.instructions.2: day-to-day talk - keep it small and true; no invented quotes beyond the supplied lines
LanguageData.romance.label: Romance & dating
LanguageData.romance.instruction: a spark between two people—an advance, a stolen glance, a whispered promise, or a heart breaking
LanguageData.romance.instructions.0: romance — use body cues already supplied or clearly implied: distance, breath, hesitation, or touch if stated
LanguageData.romance.instructions.1: romance — use the unsaid pressure: what the POV notices, holds back, or fears; do not add a new confession or private scene
LanguageData.romance.instructions.2: romance — write the moment after: the pause, the read of the other face, and the changed tension, only from supplied consequences
LanguageData.romance_relation.label: Romance milestones
LanguageData.romance_relation.instruction: a relationship becoming official, formalized, or broken; center the change between the two people without treating it like a chat log
LanguageData.recruit.label: Recruitment & prison
LanguageData.recruit.instruction: the dance of captor and captive—building rapport, breaking will, or planting seeds of rebellion
LanguageData.slavery.label: Slavery
LanguageData.slavery.instruction: the weight of chains—suppression by an overseer or the first spark of defiance
LanguageData.conversion.label: Ideology & conversion
LanguageData.conversion.instruction: a battle of belief—conversion, counseling, preaching, or the pressure of faith on faith
LanguageData.trial.label: Trials & accusations
LanguageData.trial.instruction: the weight of judgment—an accusation hurled, a defense mounted, before watching eyes
LanguageData.strangechat.label: Strange chat
LanguageData.strangechat.instruction: something wrong in ordinary conversation--a strange chat that leaves unease lingering. Don't explain it away
LanguageData.strangechat.tone: with creeping dread; never resolve the wrongness
LanguageData.anomaly.label: Anomaly & dark
LanguageData.anomaly.instruction: something wrong in an ordinary exchange: a voice, phrase, look, or silence leaves unease lingering. Keep it close to the pawn's senses and don't explain it away
LanguageData.anomaly.tone: with crawling, skin-prickling wrongness; ordinary details feel unsafe
LanguageData.insults.label: Insults & fights
LanguageData.insults.instruction: the sting of contempt—an insult, a slight, or fists about to fly
LanguageData.insults.instructions.0: an insult or slight — use the supplied social text as the sting; do not invent exact wording
LanguageData.insults.instructions.1: an insult or slight — write the body's reaction: heat, jaw, breath, posture
LanguageData.insults.instructions.2: an insult or slight — write the aftermath in the room: supplied silence, tension, or what the POV does next; do not invent exact words
LanguageData.ritual.label: Rituals & speeches
LanguageData.ritual.instruction: a solemn public moment—ritual, ceremony, or address. The colony watches
LanguageData.animal.label: Animal handling
LanguageData.animal.instruction: a quiet bond—chatting with an animal, taming, training, or letting one go
LanguageData.heartfelt.label: Heartfelt talk
LanguageData.heartfelt.instruction: warmth exchanged—a deep talk, kind words, or a gentle hand steadying someone
LanguageData.teaching.label: Teaching & lessons
LanguageData.teaching.instruction: a lesson passed down—an adult teaching or playing with a child
LanguageData.smalltalk.label: Small talk
LanguageData.smalltalk.instruction: idle chatter—low-stakes small talk that fills the silence
LanguageData.smalltalk.instructions.0: small talk — use the supplied topic if present; otherwise let the ordinary rhythm carry the entry
LanguageData.smalltalk.instructions.1: small talk — write the feeling under it: ease, awkwardness, duty, or distance
LanguageData.smalltalk.instructions.2: small talk — write the pauses and back-and-forth without inventing a new topic
LanguageData.dayreflection.label: Day's reflection
LanguageData.dayreflection.instruction: a quiet end-of-day reflection looking back on the whole day
LanguageData.dayreflection.tone: with a quiet, settling, end-of-day calm
LanguageData.arrival.label: Arrival
LanguageData.other.label: A quiet day
LanguageData.other.instruction: a social interaction between the pawns
LanguageData.socialfight.label: Social fights
LanguageData.socialfight.instruction: tempers snapped—two people came to blows. Write it as heat and impact
LanguageData.insultspree.label: Insult sprees
LanguageData.insultspree.instruction: a pawn breaking into repeated verbal cruelty; prefer the actual insult log entries when they are recorded
LanguageData.mentalbreak.label: Mental breaks
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instruction: the mind breaking—write the pawn's inner storm and what they did
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instructions.0: a mental break — write the pressure loop: the repeated thought or urge behind the named state
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instructions.1: a mental break — write it through body and motion: hands, feet, breath, and the supplied action
LanguageData.mentalbreak.instructions.2: a mental break — write the world narrowing: one simple sensation, then the state taking over
LanguageData.talecombat.label: Combat, injuries & death
LanguageData.talecombat.instruction: blood and danger—combat, injury, death, or rescue. Write what it felt like to live through it
LanguageData.talecombat.instructions.0: combat, injury, or rescue — open on a supplied sound cue if present; otherwise open on immediate danger without inventing a battle outcome
LanguageData.talecombat.instructions.1: combat, injury, or rescue — open on body impact only when supported: pain, heat, breath, or the injury already supplied
LanguageData.talecombat.instructions.2: combat, injury, or rescue — use another pawn only if supplied; otherwise stay with the POV surviving the moment
LanguageData.talehealth.label: Health & medicine
LanguageData.talehealth.instruction: the body's fragility—surgery, illness, exposure, or recovery. Write fear, relief, or trust
LanguageData.talelife.label: Life milestones
LanguageData.talelife.instruction: a turning point—birth, capture, bonding, or a new beginning. Write it as a life changed
LanguageData.talelife.tone: with the quiet weight of a turning point
LanguageData.talequality.label: Masterworks & legendary crafts
LanguageData.talequality.instruction: hands that made something lasting—pride, exhaustion, and the weight of creation
LanguageData.talework.label: Work & achievements
LanguageData.talework.instruction: the satisfaction of labor—craft, study, mining, or a skill grown. Keep it proud but grounded
LanguageData.taleanomaly.label: Anomaly horror
LanguageData.taleanomaly.instruction: anomaly, mutation, void contact, or unnatural aftermath; write dread as something witnessed up close - smell, light, skin, memory - and never explain the source
LanguageData.taleanomaly.tone: with dread and the uncanny, close enough to contaminate the page
LanguageData.taleincident.label: Raids, disasters & colony events
LanguageData.taleincident.instruction: the colony shaken—raid, disaster, or crisis. Write what it felt like to live through it
LanguageData.talequiet.label: Quiet personal moments
LanguageData.talequiet.instruction: a quiet aside—recreation, prayer, or small embarrassment. Brief and personal
LanguageData.taleother.label: A notable day
LanguageData.taleother.instruction: a notable non-social RimWorld tale involving the pawn
LanguageData.moodeventPositive.label: Positive mood events
LanguageData.moodeventPositive.instruction: something lifted—a positive colony-wide event that eases the heart
LanguageData.moodeventNegative.label: Negative mood events
LanguageData.moodeventNegative.instruction: something weighing—a negative colony-wide event that strains the spirit
LanguageData.moodeventMixed.label: Situationally mixed mood events
LanguageData.moodeventMixed.instruction: a condition that touches each person differently—write how it feels to this pawn
LanguageData.moodeventOther.label: Passing moods
LanguageData.moodeventOther.instruction: a colony-wide event affecting the pawn's mood
LanguageData.thoughtPregnancyFamily.label: Pregnancy memories
LanguageData.thoughtPregnancyFamily.instruction: pregnancy, birth loss, or the end of a pregnancy as intimate family news; write with restraint and do not assume the pawn feels only one simple emotion
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.label: Positive thoughts
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instruction: a fleeting lift in spirits—a positive thought that brightened the day. Match the intensity to the mood effect: minor joys get a quiet note, strong ones get warmth and detail
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instructions.0: a positive thought — use the supplied trigger if present; otherwise write the mood lift itself. Scale it to the effect
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instructions.1: a positive thought — write the body easing: shoulders, breath, a small private smile. Scale it to the mood lift
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.instructions.2: a positive thought — write the pull it creates: wanting the feeling to last or the day to turn. Scale it to the mood lift
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.label: Negative thoughts
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instruction: a weight on the mind—a negative thought that lingered. Match the intensity to the mood effect: minor irritations get a passing mention, severe ones get raw emotion and weight
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instructions.0: a negative thought — use the supplied trigger if present; otherwise write the sting repeating. Scale it to the mood hit
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instructions.1: a negative thought — write the body tightening: jaw, gut, restless hands. Scale it to the mood hit
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.instructions.2: a negative thought — write the loop it makes: returning, growing, hard to drop. Scale it to the mood hit
LanguageData.thoughtOther.label: Passing thoughts
LanguageData.thoughtOther.instruction: a temporary thought that crossed the pawn's mind. Match the intensity to the mood effect
LanguageData.inspiration.label: Inspirations
LanguageData.inspiration.instruction: a sudden useful clarity—write the pawn's mind catching fire with purpose, grounded in the specific kind of inspiration and any reason the game gives
LanguageData.workDarkStudy.label: Dark study work
LanguageData.workDarkStudy.instruction: dark research that should feel unsettling every time—write the work as intimate contact with something wrong; keep it spooky, sensory, and unresolved
LanguageData.workPassion.label: Passionate work
LanguageData.workPassion.instruction: work that touches one of the pawn's passions—positive, focused, quietly satisfying, without pretending the colony is easy
LanguageData.workStrain.label: Straining work
LanguageData.workStrain.instruction: work that feels dull, grimy, clumsy, or frustrating—negative when it is cleaning/dumb labor or when the pawn lacks skill
LanguageData.workRoutine.label: Routine work
LanguageData.workRoutine.instruction: ordinary colony work with no strong passion or failure signal—neutral, practical, brief, and grounded in the texture of the task
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedAnomalous.label: Anomalous body changes
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedAnomalous.instruction: the pawn's body has grown or received living anomalous flesh; make it intimate and unsettling - warmth under skin, movement where there should be stillness, a pulse or texture that feels borrowed - filtered through the attitude cue, and never explain its biology
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedArtificial.label: Artificial body parts
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedArtificial.instruction: a made thing has joined the pawn's body; write the weight, fit, useful precision, foreign rhythm, shame, or relief of the new part through the attitude and tier cues
LanguageData.hediffPartLostNatural.label: Lost body parts
LanguageData.hediffPartLostNatural.instruction: the pawn has lost a natural part of themself; write the first strange gap - shock, absence, pain, phantom feeling, bandage weight, or cold practical calculation - through the attitude and cause cues
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.label: Pregnancy
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.instruction: pregnancy as a life-changing beginning; write the pawn noticing the body, future, fear, hope, or uncertainty without assuming joy
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.tone: with intimate uncertainty and quiet weight
LanguageData.hediffLabor.label: Labor
LanguageData.hediffLabor.instruction: labor and birth approaching; write urgency, pain, fear, care, and the threshold before birth without skipping ahead to the baby unless supplied
LanguageData.hediffAnomalyCompulsion.label: Anomaly compulsions
LanguageData.hediffAnomalyCompulsion.instruction: an Anomaly-driven affliction pressing into the pawn's thoughts or body; write obsession, trance, withdrawal, rage, corpse torment, or inhuman detachment as the named condition supports, without explaining the entity or inventing treatment
LanguageData.hediffAnomalyCompulsion.tone: with intrusive, unnatural pressure on thought and flesh
LanguageData.hediffMajorHealth.label: Major health changes
LanguageData.hediffMajorHealth.instruction: a new or worsening health condition that stayed with the pawn through the day
LanguageData.raid.label: Raids
LanguageData.raid.instruction: the colony facing a raid that has spawned but may still be approaching—warning, weapons grabbed, positions taken, and the held breath before contact. Write anticipation of the fight unless supplied facts show combat already hit
LanguageData.raid.instructions.0: a raid approaching the colony — open on warning, distance, cover, weather, or the pawn checking a weapon; keep it before or at first contact
LanguageData.raid.instructions.1: the colony bracing for attackers — write the waiting, orders, doors, sandbags, breath, and fear before the fight fully starts
LanguageData.raid.instructions.2: a raid that may not have reached the defenders yet — use smoke, blood, injuries, or aftermath only if supplied; otherwise keep it to preparation, dread, and first sight of danger
LanguageData.ritualRoyal.label: Royal rituals
LanguageData.ritualRoyal.instruction: a Royalty ritual completed—make the ceremony courtly, title-conscious, psychic, or anima-rooted as the ritual title suggests
LanguageData.ritualRoyal.tone: with formal rank and ritual authority
LanguageData.ritualRoyal.tones.0: courtly and charged with rank, title, witnesses, and public authority
LanguageData.ritualRoyal.tones.1: psyfocus-hushed and tradition-bound, the ceremony larger than one pawn's body
LanguageData.ritualChildbirth.label: Childbirth ritual
LanguageData.ritualChildbirth.instruction: a childbirth ritual completed—keep the entry medically and emotionally appropriate: pain, care, risk, exhaustion, relief, or fear before mysticism
LanguageData.ritualChildbirth.tone: with clinical tenderness and bodily urgency
LanguageData.ritualChildbirth.tones.0: medical, intimate, and careful around pain, care, danger, and relief
LanguageData.ritualChildbirth.tones.1: tender but unsentimental, focused on the body, helpers, and immediate outcome
LanguageData.ritualGravship.label: Gravship launch
LanguageData.ritualGravship.instruction: a gravship departure ceremony completed before destination selection—center preflight checks, countdown, ignition, liftoff anticipation, and crew discipline; do not claim a destination was chosen, travel began, or a landing occurred
LanguageData.ritualGravship.tone: with technical pressure and launch-day focus
LanguageData.ritualGravship.tones.0: technical and procedural, centered on checks, systems, countdown, and readiness
LanguageData.ritualGravship.tones.1: tense and crew-minded, with launch discipline and restrained anticipation
LanguageData.odysseyGravshipLanding.label: Gravship landing
LanguageData.odysseyGravshipLanding.instruction: a gravship has successfully arrived—write the supplied journey reason, duration, POV role, ship, origin, and destination as first-person experience; when an exact landing outcome is supplied, weave only that visible consequence into the same landing; treat a quest site only as an arrival, never as quest completion, and invent no hazards or outcomes beyond the supplied facts
LanguageData.odysseyGravshipLanding.tone: with arrival relief, crew focus, and the weight of a mobile home coming down
LanguageData.odysseyGravshipLanding.tones.0: grounded and sensory, centered on descent, touchdown, and what this destination means
LanguageData.odysseyGravshipLanding.tones.1: crew-minded and reflective, weighing the completed passage without inventing what follows
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyInvitation.label: Anomaly invitations
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyInvitation.instruction: a psychic ritual meant to call something toward the colony completed—center the pawn's captured perspective, deliberate invitation, and uncertainty; do not claim what arrived or what happened afterward
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyInvitation.tone: with deliberate invitation and uncertain dread
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyInvitation.tones.0: expectant and uneasy, listening for an answer without deciding what answered
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyInvitation.tones.1: ritual-focused and watchful, dwelling on the choice to call rather than an unverified result
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyFleshAndWeather.label: Flesh and hostile weather rituals
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyFleshAndWeather.instruction: a psychic ritual meant to make the environment bodily or hostile completed—write the pawn's supplied role and the deliberate escalation, but do not claim that a threat arrived, harmed anyone, or persisted
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyFleshAndWeather.tone: with deliberate escalation and bodily environmental dread
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyFleshAndWeather.tones.0: visceral and apprehensive, focused on choosing to make the world less safe
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyFleshAndWeather.tones.1: heavy with hostile weather or fleshly expectation, without inventing the aftermath
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPredation.label: Predatory psychic rituals
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPredation.instruction: a psychic ritual meant to take skill, years, or psychic capacity from a target completed—attribute agency, victimhood, and sensation only through the supplied perspective and other-pawn facts; do not invent the exact loss or later condition
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPredation.tone: with intimate predation and controlled psychic harm
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPredation.tones.0: close and predatory, attentive to who acted and who endured without swapping their experiences
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPredation.tones.1: morally tense and bodily strange, stopping at the facts the captured perspective can know
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyMind.label: Mind-altering psychic rituals
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyMind.instruction: a psychic ritual meant to alter memory, feeling, or behavior completed—keep each pawn inside the supplied invoker, target, participant, or spectator perspective; do not give one role another pawn's inner effects
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyMind.tone: with invasive mental pressure and uncertain interior consequence
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyMind.tones.0: invasive and disorienting, careful about whose mind the supplied facts describe
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyMind.tones.1: psychically close but epistemically restrained, never inventing inaccessible memories or feelings
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyAbduction.label: Skip abduction rituals
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyAbduction.instruction: a psychic ritual meant to pull a person through distance completed—focus on the pawn's supplied role, reach, and danger; name an abductee or outcome only when the captured target facts explicitly supply it
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyAbduction.tone: with distant reach, sudden danger, and incomplete knowledge
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyAbduction.tones.0: tense across impossible distance, with identity and outcome left uncertain unless supplied
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyAbduction.tones.1: focused on the act of reaching and pulling, not an invented arrival or aftermath
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyDeathRefusal.label: Death-refusal ritual
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyDeathRefusal.instruction: a psychic ritual imbued a target with death refusal—write the choice to establish an unnatural relationship with death from the supplied perspective; do not claim that the target has died or returned
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyDeathRefusal.tone: with grave intent and an unfinished bargain with death
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyDeathRefusal.tones.0: solemn and unnatural, treating the ritual as preparation rather than resurrection
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyDeathRefusal.tones.1: quietly defiant toward death, while leaving any future death or return unclaimed
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPsychic.label: Psychic rituals
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPsychic.instruction: an unknown or modded Anomaly psychic ritual completed—use the supplied perspective and visible facts, keep any downstream effect uncertain, and do not invent mechanics or consequences
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPsychic.tone: with occult uncertainty and restrained psychic dread
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPsychic.tones.0: unsettling and watchful, grounded in the role and facts that were actually supplied
LanguageData.ritualAnomalyPsychic.tones.1: fragmentary and uncertain, refusing to explain or predict an unknown ritual's consequence
LanguageData.ritualFinished.label: Rituals
LanguageData.ritualFinished.instruction: a ritual completed—write the ceremony as a social, spiritual, or political moment from the pawn's assigned place in it
LanguageData.ritualFinished.tone: with ceremonial weight and personal consequence
LanguageData.ritualFinished.tones.0: ceremonial and embodied, attention fixed on role, title, and consequence
LanguageData.ritualFinished.tones.1: formal but personal, the ritual's public meaning pressing into private thought
LanguageData.abilityPsycast.label: Psycasts
LanguageData.abilityPsycast.instruction: a psychic ability used—write the moment as focus, willpower, psychic pressure, and visible consequence without inventing extra effects
LanguageData.abilityPsycast.tone: with psychic focus and charged restraint
LanguageData.abilityPsycast.tones.0: controlled and psychic, focused on effort, pressure, and the ability's visible result
LanguageData.abilityPsycast.tones.1: hushed and forceful, with the mind doing work the body can barely explain
LanguageData.abilityHostile.label: Combat abilities
LanguageData.abilityHostile.instruction: a hostile ability used in danger—write the activation as a tactical action under pressure, grounded in the supplied ability and target
LanguageData.abilityHostile.tone: with tactical pressure and sudden force
LanguageData.abilityHostile.tones.0: urgent and tactical, centered on the decision to use the power now
LanguageData.abilityHostile.tones.1: sharp and violent, but only as far as the supplied ability facts support
LanguageData.abilityUsed.label: Abilities
LanguageData.abilityUsed.instruction: a pawn used an ability—write the decision, effort, target if supplied, and immediate consequence without adding mechanics or outcomes that were not given
LanguageData.abilityUsed.tone: with focused exertion and practical consequence
LanguageData.abilityUsed.tones.0: focused and concrete, about the moment of use rather than a broad summary
LanguageData.abilityUsed.tones.1: practical and sensory, grounded in the named ability, target, and cooldown rarity
LanguageData.animal.tones.0: soft and patient, focused on trust through action
LanguageData.animal.tones.1: practical and warm, fondness shown without sentimentality
LanguageData.anomaly.tones.0: skin-prickling and sensory, one ordinary detail made wrong
LanguageData.anomaly.tones.1: cold and alien, focused on what the pawn cannot make fit
LanguageData.conversion.tones.0: fervent and declarative, like belief under pressure
LanguageData.conversion.tones.1: inward and doubtful, focused on conviction cracking
LanguageData.dayreflection.tones.0: tired and reflective, weighing what still matters
LanguageData.dayreflection.tones.1: softly closing, like the day finally going quiet
LanguageData.heartfelt.tones.0: gentle and open, letting warmth show plainly
LanguageData.heartfelt.tones.1: quietly held, warmth shown through small restraint
LanguageData.hediffAnomalyCompulsion.tones.0: intrusive and wrong, thought or nerve snagging on something outside itself
LanguageData.hediffAnomalyCompulsion.tones.1: unsettling and compulsive, the mind and body pulled where they should not go
LanguageData.hediffLabor.tones.0: urgent and bodily, breath and pain setting the pace
LanguageData.hediffLabor.tones.1: threshold-tense, focused on fear, care, and waiting
LanguageData.hediffMajorHealth.tones.0: vulnerable and bodily, symptoms shaping every thought
LanguageData.hediffMajorHealth.tones.1: quietly frightened, weakness changing the day's scale
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedAnomalous.tones.0: visceral and intimate, flesh answering before the pawn does
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedAnomalous.tones.1: quiet dread anchored in warmth, pulse, and bodily wrongness
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedArtificial.tones.0: intimate and practical, the body learning the timing of a new tool
LanguageData.hediffPartGainedArtificial.tones.1: quietly body-aware, machinery and flesh sharing one routine
LanguageData.hediffPartLostNatural.tones.0: bodily and stunned, absence louder than pain
LanguageData.hediffPartLostNatural.tones.1: raw and practical, loss becoming the body's new map
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.tones.0: body-aware and intimate, uncertainty held close
LanguageData.hediffPregnancy.tones.1: future-facing and quiet, hope and fear in balance
LanguageData.inspiration.tones.0: bright and decisive, thought turning into a plan
LanguageData.inspiration.tones.1: electric and restless, purpose pushing the body forward
LanguageData.insults.tones.0: hot and clipped, like anger held in the teeth
LanguageData.insults.tones.1: cold and cutting, focused on the sting afterward
LanguageData.insultspree.tones.0: needling and repetitive, like anger looking for targets
LanguageData.insultspree.tones.1: sour and exhausted, cruelty sounding almost automatic
LanguageData.mentalbreak.tones.0: fragmented and breathless, thought under too much pressure
LanguageData.mentalbreak.tones.1: numb and sideways, reality narrowed to one impulse
LanguageData.moodeventMixed.tones.0: uneasy and conditional, the pawn unsure how to feel
LanguageData.moodeventMixed.tones.1: alert and bodily, tracking how the condition lands
LanguageData.moodeventNegative.tones.0: heavy and low, every detail pressing downward
LanguageData.moodeventNegative.tones.1: irritated and weathered, strain showing in patience
LanguageData.moodeventPositive.tones.0: open and eased, letting relief into the sentence
LanguageData.moodeventPositive.tones.1: quietly grateful, focused on tension leaving the body
LanguageData.questAccepted.label: Quest accepted
LanguageData.questAccepted.instruction: a new quest the colony has taken on—anticipation, curiosity, and the weight of a promise made together. Write the hope or doubt it stirs in this pawn without claiming they alone accepted it
LanguageData.questAccepted.tones.0: wary and forward-looking, promise weighed against risk
LanguageData.questAccepted.tones.1: curious but guarded, hope kept under practical doubt
LanguageData.questCompleted.label: Quest completed
LanguageData.questCompleted.instruction: a quest fulfilled through the colony's common effort—relief, satisfaction, and the cost paid along the way. Write the earned resolution without claiming this pawn alone completed it
LanguageData.questCompleted.tone: with hard-won relief and quiet satisfaction
LanguageData.questCompleted.tones.0: relieved and settled, like a shared debt finally paid
LanguageData.questCompleted.tones.1: tired but proud, satisfaction measured against the colony's cost
LanguageData.questFailed.label: Quest failed
LanguageData.questFailed.instruction: a quest lost by the colony—regret, grief, and the consequences of the failure. Write the weight of what slipped away without assigning blame to this pawn alone
LanguageData.questFailed.tones.0: heavy and regretful, focused on what slipped away from everyone
LanguageData.questFailed.tones.1: quietly grieving, shared consequence felt more than explained
LanguageData.raid.tones.0: tense and tactical, waiting for the fight to break open
LanguageData.raid.tones.1: urgent but anticipatory, fear gathering before contact
LanguageData.raidDropPod.label: Drop-pod raids
LanguageData.raidDropPod.instruction: raiders punching straight into the colony by drop pod—sudden impact, no long warning, danger already inside the perimeter. Write the shock of instant contact
LanguageData.raidDropPod.instructions.0: a drop-pod raid landing inside or near the colony — open on impact, alarms, and the scramble before anyone has time to prepare
LanguageData.raidDropPod.instructions.1: a drop-pod raid with no slow approach — write the first stunned seconds, then the pawn's immediate choice of cover, weapon, or flight
LanguageData.raidDropPod.instructions.2: raiders dropping from above — keep it sudden and close; do not write as if there was a long siege or approach unless supplied facts say so
LanguageData.raidDropPod.tones.0: impact-fast and disoriented, danger already inside the walls
LanguageData.raidDropPod.tones.1: shocked and close-quarters, every sentence reacting to sudden contact
LanguageData.raidFriendly.label: Friendly arrivals & raids
LanguageData.raidFriendly.instruction: a friendly force arriving at the colony—reinforcements, allies, or a peaceful drop. Write the relief or unease they bring
LanguageData.raidFriendly.tone: with cautious relief or uneasy gratitude
LanguageData.raidFriendly.tones.1: uneasy and grateful, help still feeling like risk
LanguageData.raidInfestation.label: Infestations
LanguageData.raidInfestation.instruction: an infestation erupting from the colony's own ground—chitin, tunnels, enclosed panic, and danger already among the rooms. Write it as sudden internal horror, not a normal raid
LanguageData.raidInfestation.instructions.0: an infestation breaking open inside the colony — open on sound, dust, claws, darkness, or the room changing from safe to hostile
LanguageData.raidInfestation.instructions.1: insects bursting from within the base — write cramped fear and immediate survival, not a distant enemy approach
LanguageData.raidInfestation.instructions.2: an underground threat erupting into lived-in space — keep it close, sensory, and practical; do not invent a resolved fight
LanguageData.raidInfestation.tones.0: claustrophobic and horrified, safety turning into a breach
LanguageData.raidInfestation.tones.1: close, filthy, and panicked, the threat already underfoot
LanguageData.recruit.tones.0: controlled and strategic, every sentence weighing leverage
LanguageData.recruit.tones.1: tight and wary, focused on power in the room
LanguageData.ritual.tones.0: ceremonial and still, aware of watching eyes
LanguageData.ritual.tones.1: reverent but uneasy, focused on duty and consequence
LanguageData.romance.tones.0: close and physical, with restrained vulnerability
LanguageData.romance.tones.1: quietly reflective, focused on what changed
LanguageData.romance_relation.tones.0: formal and life-changing, with quiet restraint
LanguageData.romance_relation.tones.1: private and raw, focused on the bond shifting
LanguageData.rimtalk_chatter.tones.0: loose and conversational, like talk drifting through the room
LanguageData.rimtalk_chatter.tones.1: plain and observant, small words carrying small weights
LanguageData.slavery.tones.0: oppressive and heavy, focused on control
LanguageData.slavery.tones.1: quietly defiant, with anger kept under pressure
LanguageData.smalltalk.tones.0: loose and conversational, carried by small pauses
LanguageData.smalltalk.tones.1: plain and companionable, ordinary detail doing the work
LanguageData.socialfight.tones.0: fast and physical, driven by impact and breath
LanguageData.socialfight.tones.1: shocked and aftermath-heavy, anger cooling into consequence
LanguageData.strangechat.tones.0: ordinary on the surface, wrong underneath
LanguageData.strangechat.tones.1: quietly uncanny, ending before the wrongness resolves
LanguageData.taleanomaly.tones.0: uncanny and watchful, every ordinary detail suspect
LanguageData.taleanomaly.tones.1: intimate and contaminated, as if the wrongness followed the pawn home
LanguageData.talecombat.tones.0: visceral and immediate, body first and thought second
LanguageData.talecombat.tones.1: stunned and aftershock-heavy, danger echoing afterward
LanguageData.talehealth.tones.0: fragile and clinical, focused on body and risk
LanguageData.talehealth.tones.1: relieved but shaken, trust or fear still present
LanguageData.taleincident.tones.0: reeling and urgent, focused on the scramble
LanguageData.taleincident.tones.1: hollow and stunned, focused on the damage after
LanguageData.talelife.tones.0: hushed and consequential, aware life has turned
LanguageData.talelife.tones.1: immediate and personal, focused on the first changed breath
LanguageData.talequality.tones.0: proud and tactile, focused on hands and material
LanguageData.talequality.tones.1: bone-tired and satisfied, accomplishment after strain
LanguageData.talequiet.tones.0: private and spare, one small feeling held close
LanguageData.talequiet.tones.1: light and brief, a passing note rather than a confession
LanguageData.talework.tones.0: steady and practical, pride kept close to the work
LanguageData.talework.tones.1: quietly pleased, focused on skill settling into the body
LanguageData.teaching.tones.0: patient and instructive, focused on small progress
LanguageData.teaching.tones.1: playful but grounded, affection shown through attention
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.tones.0: low and nagging, the thought returning in loops
LanguageData.thoughtNegative.tones.1: tight and bodily, irritation or hurt sitting in the gut
LanguageData.thoughtOther.tones.0: brief and half-felt, gone almost as it arrives
LanguageData.thoughtOther.tones.1: plain and observational, naming the mood without drama
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.tones.0: small and bright, like tension briefly loosening
LanguageData.thoughtPositive.tones.1: quietly buoyant, focused on a thought worth keeping
LanguageData.thoughtPregnancyFamily.tones.0: restrained and intimate, emotion held carefully
LanguageData.thoughtPregnancyFamily.tones.1: body-aware and uncertain, hope and fear both possible
LanguageData.trial.tones.0: formal and brittle, each sentence like testimony
LanguageData.trial.tones.1: watched and exposed, focused on shame or defense
LanguageData.workDarkStudy.tones.0: close and sensory, dread coming through the work itself
LanguageData.workDarkStudy.tones.1: quietly contaminated, curiosity feeling like a mistake
LanguageData.workPassion.tones.0: focused and satisfied, pleasure kept practical
LanguageData.workPassion.tones.1: absorbed and tactile, passion showing through the task
LanguageData.workRoutine.tones.0: matter-of-fact and rhythmic, ordinary work continuing
LanguageData.workRoutine.tones.1: quietly practical, attention on tools and sequence
LanguageData.workStrain.tones.0: weary and blunt, frustration in the hands
LanguageData.workStrain.tones.1: grimy and resigned, irritation kept under duty
LanguageData.progressionSkillPassion.label: Passion skill milestone
LanguageData.progressionSkillPassion.instruction: a passion skill milestone; write pride, effort, frustration, or identity through the named skill and level only
LanguageData.progressionSkillPassion.tones.0: proud but grounded, aware of the labor behind the milestone
LanguageData.progressionSkillPassion.tones.1: quietly intense, treating skill as part of who the pawn is becoming
LanguageData.progressionPsylink.label: Psylink gained
LanguageData.progressionPsylink.instruction: a psylink level gain; write the psychic change as lived sensation, responsibility, or unease, without inventing new powers
LanguageData.progressionPsylink.tones.0: awed and uneasy, aware of power settling into the mind
LanguageData.progressionPsylink.tones.1: focused and intimate, describing the change from inside the body
LanguageData.progressionXenotype.label: Gene identity changed
LanguageData.progressionXenotype.instruction: a gene-identity change; write the bodily and identity shift from the pawn's perspective using only the supplied xenotype and selected gene-theme facts
LanguageData.progressionXenotype.tones.0: changed and watchful, noticing the self becoming unfamiliar
LanguageData.progressionXenotype.tones.1: visceral and private, focused on what the new body means tonight
LanguageData.progressionRoyalTitle.label: Royal title changed
LanguageData.progressionRoyalTitle.instruction: a royal title change; write status, burden, pride, or distance through the new title without explaining faction mechanics
LanguageData.progressionRoyalTitle.tone: with formal weight and personal cost
LanguageData.progressionRoyalTitle.tones.0: measured and self-conscious, aware that a title changes how others look
LanguageData.progressionRoyalTitle.tones.1: quietly burdened, treating rank as both honor and obligation
LanguageData.progressionTraitGained.label: New trait
LanguageData.progressionTraitGained.instruction: a lasting turn in who the pawn is; using only the supplied trait name and its description, write the change from the inside — new urges, reactions, fears, or ways of seeing the world settling into them — as something lived, never as a game trait, stat, number, or mechanic
LanguageData.progressionTraitGained.tones.0: quietly startled, noticing the self think or want something new
LanguageData.progressionTraitGained.tones.1: reflective and intimate, tracing where the change shows in ordinary moments
LanguageData.progressionOther.label: Progression
LanguageData.progressionOther.instruction: a pawn changed in a notable way; write the supplied before-and-after fact plainly and personally
LanguageData.externalDevTest.label: External test event
LanguageData.externalDevTest.instruction: a test event submitted through the mod integration API; write a short grounded note about an odd but harmless moment
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.label: Entity attacks
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.instruction: inhuman things attacking the colony - write survival under dread, bodies refusing what they see, not a normal battle; never explain what the creatures are
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.instructions.0: inhuman attackers - open on the first wrong detail: shape, gait, wet sound, impossible silence, or a familiar space made unsafe; do not name what they are beyond the supplied label
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.instructions.1: inhuman attackers - write the body refusing to accept them as living people: nausea, hair rising, aim shaking, the urge to look away
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.instructions.2: inhuman attackers — keep it survival-close and sensory; use injuries or outcomes only if supplied, and never resolve the horror
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.tone: with horror pressing through combat urgency
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.tones.0: horrified and sensory, the attackers not registering as people
LanguageData.raidAnomalyEntities.tones.1: tight and survival-focused, wrongness kept at the edge of the page
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.label: Climate hardship
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.instruction: the climate itself turned hostile—a lasting cold snap, heat wave, or darkened sky. Write the body and the routines coping, not a single dramatic moment
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.instructions.0: hostile climate — write the body first: numb fingers, sweat, shallow breath, clothes that stopped being enough
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.instructions.1: hostile climate — write the small adjustments: rationing, moved bedrolls, doors kept shut, crops watched with worry
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.instructions.2: hostile climate — let the weather set the day's scale; people and tasks bend around it without a named villain
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.tone: with worn, enduring patience against the weather
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.tones.0: weathered and practical, endurance measured in small chores
LanguageData.moodeventWeatherHardship.tones.1: quietly worried, the sky deciding what tomorrow costs
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.label: Sky violence
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.instruction: the sky turned violent—dry lightning, fire, or rain that should not exist. Write sudden danger from above without inventing damage that was not supplied
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.instructions.0: sky violence — open on light, sound, or smell: the flash, the crack, the burning air, the first wrong drops
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.instructions.1: sky violence — write the scramble to react: watching for fires, pulling people indoors, counting what stands exposed
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.instructions.2: sky violence — if the rain itself is wrong, keep it wrong; unease before explanation, and no invented outcome
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.tone: with sharp alarm under an open sky
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.tones.0: startled and watchful, the sky suddenly an enemy
LanguageData.moodeventStormDanger.tones.1: tense and reactive, danger arriving faster than understanding
LanguageData.mentalbreakViolent.label: Violent breaks
LanguageData.mentalbreakViolent.instruction: the mind breaking outward—rage that needs a target. Write the heat, the loss of the room, and the moment the body stops asking permission
LanguageData.mentalbreakViolent.instructions.0: a violent break — write the pressure snapping: the last small thing, then heat taking the hands
LanguageData.mentalbreakViolent.instructions.1: a violent break — write it through the body: jaw, knuckles, breath, the world reduced to what can be hit
LanguageData.mentalbreakViolent.instructions.2: a violent break — if the storm has passed, write the shame and the wreckage the pawn can actually see
LanguageData.mentalbreakViolent.tone: with red, boiling loss of control
LanguageData.mentalbreakViolent.tones.0: boiling and immediate, fury ahead of thought
LanguageData.mentalbreakEscape.label: Withdrawal breaks
LanguageData.mentalbreakEscape.instruction: the mind breaking inward—flight, hiding, or giving up. Write the world becoming too loud and the pull to be anywhere else
LanguageData.mentalbreakEscape.instructions.0: an inward break — write the retreat: feet moving before a decision, the door, the dark, the quiet corner
LanguageData.mentalbreakEscape.instructions.1: an inward break — write the weight: everything asked of the pawn at once, and the moment of putting it all down
LanguageData.mentalbreakEscape.instructions.2: an inward break — keep the sadness plain and bodily; no dramatic speech, just the leaving
LanguageData.mentalbreakEscape.tones.0: hollow and slow, the world too loud to stay in
LanguageData.mentalbreakEscape.tones.1: numb and drifting, one foot after the other away from people
LanguageData.mentalbreakIndulgent.label: Compulsive breaks
LanguageData.mentalbreakIndulgent.instruction: the mind breaking into compulsion—a binge, a spree, an obsession that feels like relief while it ruins something. Write the hunger and the guilt circling it
LanguageData.mentalbreakIndulgent.instructions.0: a compulsive break — write the pull: the promise the compulsion makes, and how good the first taste of it feels
LanguageData.mentalbreakIndulgent.instructions.1: a compulsive break — write the narrowing: rules, duties, and other people fading behind the one urgent thing
LanguageData.mentalbreakIndulgent.instructions.2: a compulsive break — let guilt flicker at the edges without stopping anything
LanguageData.mentalbreakIndulgent.tones.0: hungry and rationalizing, relief winning over sense
LanguageData.mentalbreakIndulgent.tones.1: sour and compulsive, the urge louder than the shame
LanguageData.eventWindowMechCluster.label: Mech cluster
LanguageData.eventWindowMechCluster.instruction: dormant war machines assembled nearby; write the waiting, the watching, and the planning — cold mechanical danger that has not moved yet, never an invented battle
LanguageData.eventWindowMechCluster.tones.0: tense and watchful, danger sitting on the horizon
LanguageData.eventWindowMechCluster.tones.1: measured and grim, counting defenses against what waits
LanguageData.observedPitGate.label: Pit gate
LanguageData.observedPitGate.instruction: a pit gate torn open in the colony's ground; write what can be seen and heard at its edge, and never explain what is at the bottom
LanguageData.observedPitGate.tone: with dread of what climbs out
LanguageData.observedPitGate.tones.0: hushed and wary, the ground itself no longer trusted
LanguageData.observedPitGate.tones.1: tight and alert, every sound from below counted
LanguageData.observedFleshmassHeart.label: Fleshmass heart
LanguageData.observedFleshmassHeart.instruction: a heart of living flesh growing toward the colony; write revulsion and urgency without explaining its biology or inventing a resolved fight
LanguageData.observedFleshmassHeart.tones.0: sickened and practical, cutting back what keeps growing
LanguageData.observedFleshmassHeart.tones.1: unnerved and bodily, the sound of it hard to unhear
LanguageData.progressionGrowthMoment.label: Growth moment
LanguageData.progressionGrowthMoment.instruction: a committed childhood growth choice; center identity, changing interests, names, responsibilities, and the qualitative opportunity supplied, without quoting tiers, counts, work lists, or judging the adults who raised the child
LanguageData.progressionGrowthMoment.tone: with formative self-recognition and an uncertain view of who comes next
LanguageData.progressionGrowthMoment.tones.0: personal and forward-looking, grounded in the trait or interests that actually changed
LanguageData.progressionGrowthMoment.tones.1: aware that new choices opened without turning opportunity into a score or inventing who caused it
LanguageData.progressionMechanitorLifecycle.label: Mechanitor lifecycle
LanguageData.progressionMechanitorLifecycle.instructi: a mechanitor lifecycle chapter; write from the human controller's perspective using only the supplied mech, service, combat, or boss-threat facts, never treating bandwidth as emotion and never inventing who struck a final blow
LanguageData.progressionMechanitorLifecycle.tone: with responsibility for minds made into command and consequence
LanguageData.progressionMechanitorLifecycle.tones.0: intimate and accountable, centered on the controller's bond with command
LanguageData.progressionMechanitorLifecycle.tones.1: technological but personal, keeping exact machines and threats grounded in lived consequence
LanguageData.biotechFamilyBirth.label: Family birth
LanguageData.biotechFamilyBirth.instruction: a canonical family birth remembered by an exact adult participant; use only the supplied role and outcome facts, allow mixed fear, grief, exhaustion, relief, or uncertainty, and never assume joy or wanted parenthood
LanguageData.biotechFamilyBirth.tone: with intimate consequence and emotionally honest uncertainty
LanguageData.biotechFamilyBirth.tones.0: close to the body and the immediate outcome, without assigning feelings the writer did not supply
LanguageData.biotechFamilyBirth.tones.1: family-centered but unsentimental, careful about distinct birther, mother, and father roles
LanguageData.personaWeaponLifecycle.label: Persona weapon bonds
LanguageData.personaWeaponLifecycle.instruction: a persona-weapon bond lifecycle edge; use the exact weapon, previous/new bond state, duration, prior bonded pawn, ending cause, and selected structural trait facts supplied; never invent speech, a combat scene, a weapon motive, or a death
LanguageData.personaWeaponLifecycle.tone: with intimate loyalty, friction, and the unsettling presence of a weapon that remembers
LanguageData.personaWeaponLifecycle.tones.0: intimate and uncanny, treating the bond as a lived relationship without giving the weapon invented dialogue
LanguageData.personaWeaponLifecycle.tones.1: close and reflective, grounded in loyalty, absence, return, or finality shown by the exact lifecycle facts
